title: fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/buildkit to v0.23.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>moby/buildkit (github.com/moby/buildkit)</summary>

### [`v0.23.0`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.23.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/compare/v0.22.0...v0.23.0)

Welcome to the v0.23.0 release of buildkit!

Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at
https://github.com/moby/buildkit/issues.

##### Contributors

-   Tõnis Tiigi
-   CrazyMax
-   Akihiro Suda
-   Anthony Nandaa
-   Austin Vazquez
-   Brian Goff
-   Dan Duvall
-   Jonathan A. Sternberg
-   Nicolas Schweitzer
-   Roberto Villarreal
-   Sebastiaan van Stijn
-   zfrank

##### Notable Changes

-   Add opt-in support for SLSA provenance v1. This is expected to become the default in a future release. [#​6005](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6005) [docs](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/blob/master/docs/attestations/slsa-definitions.md)
-   Allow duration based filters on diskusage requests. [#​5455](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5455)
-   Allow authorization secrets to be set per hostname with `HTTP_AUTH_HEADER_<host>` or `HTTP_AUTH_TOKEN_<host>`. [#​6023](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6023)
-   Add support for raw mode in the SSH agent provider. [#​6003](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6003)
-   Improve URL joining to prevent malformed GitHub Cache service URLs. [#​6026](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6026) [tonistiigi/go-actions-cache#38](https://redirect.github.com/tonistiigi/go-actions-cache/issues/38)
-   Update Runc v1.3.0. [#​5977](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5977)
-   Fix possible "unknown file mode" error when transferring files on Windows (previous fix did not work). [#​6025](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6025)
-   Fix race condition when enabling and disabling privileges in WCOW. [#​5959](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5959)
-   Fix unnecessary registry requests for local image lookups if reference contains a digest. [#​6029](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6029)
-   Fix privileges error for local exporter in WCOW. [#​6007](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6007)
-   Fix OCI export of multi-platform scratch result. [#​5996](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5996)
-   Fix handle not found error during cache export. [#​5999](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/5999)
-   Fix `type=local,platform-split=true` for single platform build to work the same as it would with a multi-platform build. [#​6007](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6007)
-   Fix some data races shown on the race detector. [#​6006](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/issues/6006)

##### Dependency Changes

-   **github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim**                                                 v0.12.9 -> v0.13.0
-   **github.com/containerd/accelerated-container-image**                            v1.2.3 -> v1.3.0
-   **github.com/containerd/console**                                                v1.0.4 -> v1.0.5
-   **github.com/containerd/containerd/api**                                         v1.8.0 -> v1.9.0
-   **github.com/containerd/containerd/v2**                                          v2.0.5 -> v2.1.1
-   **github.com/containerd/fuse-overlayfs-snapshotter/v2**                          v2.1.1 -> v2.1.6
-   **github.com/containerd/nydus-snapshotter**                                      v0.15.0 -> v0.15.2
-   **github.com/containernetworking/cni**                                           v1.2.3 -> v1.3.0
-   **github.com/containernetworking/plugins**                                       v1.5.1 -> v1.7.1
-   **github.com/docker/cli**                                                        v28.1.1 -> v28.2.2
-   **github.com/docker/docker**                                                     v28.1.1 -> v28.2.2
-   **github.com/fsnotify/fsnotify**                                                 v1.7.0 -> v1.9.0
-   **github.com/google/pprof**                                                      [`a892ee0`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/a892ee059fd6) -> [`27863c8`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/27863c87afa6)
-   **github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2**                                    v2.22.0 -> v2.26.1
-   **github.com/in-toto/in-toto-golang**                                            v0.5.0 -> v0.9.0
-   **github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec**                                       v1.2.0 -> v1.2.1
-   **github.com/opencontainers/selinux**                                            v1.11.1 -> v1.12.0
-   **github.com/prometheus/client_golang**                                          v1.20.5 -> v1.22.0
-   **github.com/prometheus/common**                                                 v0.55.0 -> v0.62.0
-   **github.com/secure-systems-lab/go-securesystemslib**                            v0.4.0 -> v0.6.0
-   **github.com/spdx/tools-golang**                                                 v0.5.3 -> v0.5.5
-   **github.com/tonistiigi/fsutil**                                                 [`3f76f81`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/3f76f8130144) -> [`586307a`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/586307ad452f)

-   **google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/rpc**                                    [`324edc3`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/324edc3d5d38) -> [`56aae31`](https://redirect.github.com/moby/buildkit/commit/56aae31c358a)
-   **google.golang.org/grpc**                                                       v1.69.4 -> v1.72.2
-   **google.golang.org/protobuf**                                                   v1.35.2 -> v1.36.6
-   **kernel.org/pub/linux/libs/security/libcap/cap**                                v1.2.73 -> v1.2.76
